food.name: Cullen Skink
food.description: Smoked haddock, cream, potato, chive oil. A proper Scottish classic, done right.

food.name: Haggis Bon Bons
food.description: Traditional haggis, whisky cream sauce, pickled turnip. Three per portion.

food.name: 28-Day Aged Ribeye
food.description: Perthshire beef, triple-cooked chips, peppercorn sauce, watercress.

food.name: Beer-Battered Haddock
food.description: West Coast haddock, hand-cut chips, minted mushy peas, tartare sauce.

food.name: The Anchor Burger
food.description: Double smash patty, aged cheddar, house pickle, brioche, skin-on fries.

food.name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
food.description: Medjool date sponge, butterscotch sauce, Ayrshire vanilla ice cream.

drinks.name: Tennent's Lager
drinks.description: Scotland's favourite pint. Cold, crisp, perfect.

drinks.name: Belhaven Best
drinks.description: Classic Scottish real ale, smooth and malty.

drinks.name: Caledonian 80/-
drinks.description: Rich, full-bodied Scottish heavy. A pub classic.

drinks.name: House Red / White
drinks.description: Ask your server for today's selection. Glass or bottle available.

sunday.name: Sunday Roast — Beef
sunday.description: Slow-roasted Perthshire silverside, Yorkshire pudding, roasties, seasonal veg, gravy.

sunday.name: Sunday Roast — Chicken
sunday.description: Half roasted chicken, stuffing, roasties, seasonal veg, gravy.

sunday.name: Sunday Roast — Veggie
sunday.description: Roasted root vegetable wellington, roasties, seasonal veg, vegetarian gravy.
